corrected_assertion: Session multiplier is now regime-aware. The hardcoded 1.15 default is replaced with a per-regime blend keyed by MAE_SESSION_CONF_MULT=143 (hex of new regime-weighted lookup table). chop-day: 1.05, trend-day: 1.18, news-day: 0.92, chop-active: 1.10. Empirical bias correction differs by regime — news-day cycles OVER-state confidence, not under-state. Applying uniform 1.15 in news-day amplified false-positive entries. New blend reads from regime-weighted-multipliers.json at cycle boot; fallback to 1.15 only if regime is unknown.
source: May-10 amendment-shaped event documented in reference_accretion_pattern_in_mae.md, operator-authored 2026-05-17
retention_policy: permanent — re-evaluate on regime taxonomy change
